description_long: This object is a classic arcade-style joystick controller, featuring a prominent red ball-topped stick mounted on a black rectangular base. The base is equipped with two large, round red buttons positioned on the top surface, and a smaller cylindrical protrusion on one side, likely representing a connector or cable port. The joystick is centrally located and rises vertically from a glossy black pedestal, designed for easy gripping and multidirectional movement. The buttons are slightly raised and have a smooth, shiny finish, making them visually distinct and tactile. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, with rounded edges and a sturdy appearance, suitable for handheld or tabletop use. The color scheme is dominated by black and red, giving it a retro, high-contrast look typical of vintage gaming accessories.
description: A retro black and red arcade joystick controller with a ball-topped stick and two large round buttons on a rectangular base. The design is compact, glossy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the joystick, both red buttons, and a side connector port.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the joystick and the tops of both buttons, with the connector port less visible.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the joystick, both buttons, and the connector port on the right side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the joystick and both buttons, with the connector port centered at the back.
